title: Grilled Argentinian Beef Skewers
description: A classic South American dish featuring marinated beef skewers grilled to perfection.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince and mix with olive oil

instructions: 1. Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
2. Thread 3-4 pieces of beef onto each skewer.
3. In a small bowl, mix together minced garlic and olive oil.
4. Brush the garlic and oil mixture onto both sides of the beef cubes.
5. Season the beef with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the beef reaches your desired level of doneness.
7. Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for a few minutes.
8. Serve the skewers hot with chimichurri sauce and lemon wedges on the side.
9. Garnish with fresh parsley or oregano, if desired.
